ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent/guardian */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent/guardian */,
  "parent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent/guardian */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Mathematics, Science) */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the teacher (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher teaching the class */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject being taught in the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the class in hours */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits associated with the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_classes" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the class */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the class */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance of the student in the class */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, test, project) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was administered */,
  "assessment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the assessment */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grading scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessments" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score the student achieved on the assessment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the student submitted the assessment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the teacher on the student's assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grading_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grading scale */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the grading scale belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the grade range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the grade range */,
  "grade_points" REAL /* Grade points associated with each grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grading_scales_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic goal */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the goal belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the goal is related to */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Description of the academic goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date by which the student should achieve the goal */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress the student has made towards achieving the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_goals_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_goals_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the report belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the progress report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, semester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report card */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the report card belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report card was generated */,
  "grades" TEXT /* Text of the report card, including grades */,
  "report_card_type" TEXT /* Type of report card (e.g., quarterly, semester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_cards_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher comment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the comment belongs to */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the teacher comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., academic, behavioral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_comments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_comments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the attendance record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the student attended school on that date */,
  "attendance_type" TEXT /* Type of attendance (e.g., regular, irregular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standardized_test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the test score belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the standardized test */,
  "score" REAL /* Score the student achieved on the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the student took the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standardized_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
